title: Cobalt Miner
description:
🌵 A debt you can’t escapeIt’s 2046. Water is scarce. Land is barren. Corporations rule everything. You are bound by a contract you never truly understood - a massive debt owed to a ruthless megacorporation. The only way out?

Extract. Build. Expand. Survive.

Every unit of cobalt you mine brings you closer to freedom… or deeper into the system.

⛏️ MINING & RESOURCE EXTRACTIONStart with basic tools and carve your way through a harsh, dry landscape rich in valuable minerals.

• Mine cobalt and rare resources

• Discover new deposits across expanding regions

• Manage limited energy and equipment durability

• Optimize routes between extraction sites and storage

• Sell resources and crafted goods in settlements

What begins as manual labor quickly becomes a logistical challenge.

🤖 AUTOMATION & PRODUCTIONYou weren’t meant to do this alone.

Build a growing industrial network in the middle of nowhere:

• Deploy automated drills and extractors

• Use drones to transport and manage resources

• Create processing chains to refine raw materials

• Expand with storage units and power systems

Design your own efficient production system - or watch it collapse under its own weight.

🔧 CRAFTING & UPGRADESTurn raw materials into survival.

• Craft tools, machines, and infrastructure

• Upgrade your gear, extraction speed, and efficiency

• Improve your electric motorbike for longer expeditions

• Unlock advanced technologies as your operation grows

Every upgrade is a step toward independence - and a bigger target on your back.

🏍️ EXPLORATION & TRAVELThe world is vast. And it doesn’t care about you.

Travel across desolate terrain:

• Explore new zones filled with resources and secrets

• Ride your electric motorbike across long distances

• Manage battery levels - always carry spares

• Navigate hazards, abandoned sites, and hidden locations

Freedom is out there. But reaching it won’t be easy.

🏙️ STORY & WORLDYou’re not alone in this broken system.

• Meet people trying to survive under corporate control

• Trade in remote settlements and struggling towns

• Uncover stories hidden beneath contracts and machines

• Decide how far you’re willing to go to clear your debt

Not everyone believes in freedom anymore.

🎮 GAME FEATURES• 🌵 Pixel-art 2D world set in a futuristic USA (2046)

• ⛏️ Mining, refining, and resource management

• 🤖 Deep automation systems with machines and drones

• 🔧 Crafting and extensive upgrade paths

• 🏍️ Exploration with battery-based vehicle mechanics

• 🏙️ Narrative-driven world with NPCs and trading

• 📈 Build, optimize, and scale your industrial network

• 

⚠️ PAY YOUR DEBTOr become part of it.
description_short: Survive in futuristic 2046 USA where a ruthless megacorporation owns your debt. Mine cobalt, automate production, craft machines, explore a dying world, and ride your electric bike across vast pixel-art wastelands. Pay what you owe… or disappear.
